name: graph_streaming_encode_labeled_counts
description: Streaming graph encode with the opt-in labeled trailer counts form (SPEC 8.4.1): options.labeledTrailerCounts=true makes '##! summary' counts emit as label:count (counts=targets:1,related:1,edges:1). Same input as 004 (default positional counts=1,1,1). Runners skip a graph-stream-encode fixture whose options they do not support.
